strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators and real-world AI product exposure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source AI-adjacent platform used by NGOs
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and contact info, raising red flags about authenticity or attention to detail
No explicit mention of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research, missing preferred qualification for strategic AI leadership
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy experience or customer-facing AI advisory roles at director level
response.justification: Aisha brings deep, diverse engineering experience with clear AI and cloud exposure through agentic tooling and open-source platforms, plus strong leadership via founding GISCollective — but the resume's inconsistencies and lack of formal AI credentials or strategic customer advisory experience raise concerns about readiness for a director-level AI strategy role.
